title: En Maima Peru  Anjala Lyrics Gana Sudhakar
stanzas:
en maima
peru thaanda anjala
ava kabilinu
poondhutaada nenjula

unnaandathaan naanum
vandhu kenjala.
aanaa maattikittu
thavikkurendi loveula.

thakkaali pazhamaa
pizhinjitta enna.
manasa meenaattam
aanjitta ponne.

bussunu seerura
naagini pola
kalugaa suththurendi
un pinnaala

vaadi nee vaadi
en gulpi gulpi.
vaaya konayaathaan
vachikinnu edukkalaam
selfi selfi. (2)

en maima
peru thaanda anjala
ava kabilinu
poondhutaada nenjula

jingu jingunu nadakkura
nadaiyila
noolu vittu pochu
ungammaa sutta vadaiyila

jetta polathaan
pushunu paayuren.
pinnaala vandhu naanu
slipper-aattam theiyuren

gudu gudunu odi vaadi
neethaan enakku venum.
kanna renda
thorandhu paarthaa
jee boombaa kaanom

sillaaki phillaapi
nee scenu vuttaa
jilaepi.
maama kitta kaattaathadi
pimbilikkaa philaapi..

en maima en maima
un maaman unakkuthaamaa
en maima maima maima
un maamana nambi
nee vaamaa

en maima
peru thaanda anjala
ava kabilinu
poondhutaada nenjula

irukkura brighta
sirikkura cute-a
nee pota ballula
naan aayitendi out-a

hello-nu solluvaale
romba ava sweetaa
unnaalathaan naan
aayiten di outaa.

nilavula vadaiya
sutta kadhiya sollaatha
maava pola enna neeyum
slowa mellaatha

nattaaru vittaaru
naan gaanavula
peter-u
nee illaama odaathadi
sudha-voda scooter-u

maima en maima
un maaman unakkuthaamaa
en maima maima maima
un maaman unakkuthaamaa

silukkura smithaa nee
nadaiyila namithaa
un parottaaku naan
saalnaavaa varattaa

paayura bulletaa nee
pannaathadi galattaa
unnaala aayitendi
gaana sudha robot-a

thangathula thaali senju
unakku maattatta
ippo sollu uppu mootta
unna thokkattaa

neethaandi enakku inga
guardu pota rightingu
goa-ku polaamaadi
rendu perum outingu

en maima en maima
en maima maaman thaamaa
en maima maima maima maima
un maamana nambi nee vaamaa

peru thaanda anjala

poondhutaada nenjula

unnaandathaan naanum
vandhu kenjala.
aanaa maattikittu
thavikkurendi loveula.

thakkaali pazhamaa
pizhinjitta enna.
manasa meenaattam
aanjitta ponne.

bussunu seerura

un pinnaala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions related to love and longing, highlighting the complexities of romantic relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by the talented Gana Sudhakar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 8, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song En Maima Peru Anjala beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. It conveys the emotional turmoil faced by lovers, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced heartbreak. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. This song is perfect for moments of reflection and relaxation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Maima Peru Anjala is a soul-stirring melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Gana Sudhakar, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet emotions of romance. Its heartfelt lyrics and soothing tune make it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: my heart's name is Anjala, it blooms in my heart like a flower
I too came to ask for you. But love is changing and making me suffer.
What is left of the tomato has fallen. My heart is like a fish in a net.
Like a snake that wraps around, you are circling around me.
You go, I go, my heart is fluttering. Let's take a selfie without opening our mouths.
my heart's name is Anjala, it blooms in my heart like a flower
The jingling sound is walking, the thread has come loose, you are like a fried doughnut.
I am like a jet, I am going to play. Later I will play with slippers.
I want you to run fast. If I see both my eyes, it will be a blast.
You are a little philly, you are showing off. Don't show it to uncle, you are a little philly.
my heart, my heart, is it for your uncle? my heart, heart, heart, do you trust your uncle?
my heart's name is Anjala, it blooms in my heart like a flower
You are bright and smiling, you are cute, if you throw a ball, I will be out.
If you say hello, it is very sweet, because of you, I am out.
Like a slow-moving cow, don't say anything, you too should be slow and gentle.
They have left the village, I am in the song, without you, I am like a scooter without fuel.
my heart, my heart, is it for your uncle? my heart, heart, heart, do you trust your uncle?
You are walking gracefully, I will come to your parotta.
You are not a bullet, you are a galatta, because of you, I have become a singing robot.
You have tied the thali in gold, now tell me, don't put salt in the food.
You go, I will go, like a guard here, we can go to Goa, both of us are out.
my heart, my heart, my uncle is it? my heart, heart, heart, do you trust your uncle?
my heart's name is Anjala, it blooms in my heart like a flower
I too came to ask for you. But love is changing and making me suffer.
What is left of the tomato has fallen. My heart is like a fish in a net.
Like a snake that wraps around, you are circling around me.
You go, I go, my heart is fluttering. Let's take a selfie without opening our mouths.
my heart's name is Anjala, it blooms in my heart like a flower
